title: rosa canina f. flexibilis
intro: Rosa canina f. flexibilis, also known as the flexible dog rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa canina plant, which is a deciduous shrub native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, and is used to treat a variety of health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and wounds. The health benefits of Rosa canina f. flexibilis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina f. flexibilis include teas, infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used topically or internally to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
